acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_prose_001] Pass if, on rereading the cited lines, at least four of those six beats have been recast into distinct non-'Not ...' sentence shapes while preserving the same narrative information and pressure; fail if three or more still hinge on sentence-initial negation for emphasis.

[chapter_03_prose_002] Pass if no more than two of the cited passages still describe Reed Gate or the cut through breath/throat/mouth anatomy and at least two replacement lines instead register the change through mechanical pressure or current behavior consistent with Riva's voice; fail if the chapter still returns to the same organ-metaphor in three or more of those locations.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on rereading the cited lines, at least four of those six beats have been recast into distinct non-'Not ...' sentence shapes while preserving the same narrative information and pressure; fail if three or more still hinge on sentence-initial negation for emphasis.
findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on emphatic sentence-initial negation ('Not ...') at major turns. By the third and fourth reuse, the emphasis reads like a preloaded prose habit rather than a fresh perception from Riva's body, which flattens several otherwise strong peaks.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the emphasis beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:405, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:415, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:465, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:523 so no more than two of them rely on sentence-initial negation. Keep the force of refusal, but vary the syntax through concrete consequence, motion, or differently shaped interiority specific to the local action.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than two of the cited passages still describe Reed Gate or the cut through breath/throat/mouth anatomy and at least two replacement lines instead register the change through mechanical pressure or current behavior consistent with Riva's voice; fail if the chapter still returns to the same organ-metaphor in three or more of those locations.
findings.problem: The gate/cut is repeatedly rendered as a breathing throat or mouth. The first uses are vivid, but the repeated organic personification becomes a detectable tic and starts overriding Riva's stronger labor-and-mechanism diction from the style bible.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep only the most valuable throat/breath image beats among snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:51, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:371, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:527. Rewrite at least three of the others through Riva's practical vocabulary of strain, jam, pressure, drag, hinge bite, cable song, or current force so the gate feels uncanny without defaulting to the same body metaphor.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
